name: Evermore Chemical Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Evermore Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. produces and sells synthetic leather polyurethane (PU) resins in China, Taiwan, and internationally. The company offers solvent based PU components, thermoplastic PU components, PU adhesives, aqueous based PU dispersion, polyurethane system polyester, poly isocyanates cross-linking agent hardners, polyester polyol components, and UV Monomer/Oligomer, etc. It serves various industries, such as footwear, synthetic leather, optical electronics, textiles, adhesives, coating, paints and ink, tube and hose, optical glass, etc. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Nantou, Taiwan. Evermore Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Aica Kogyo Company, Limited.
